title: moogs_structures:moogs_structures_generic_nether_jigsaw_structure
description: MSL's jigsaw structure type for Nether dimensions. Searches for a land surface above or below the structure and anchors to it.

start_pool.description: Namespaced resource location of the starting template pool.

size.description: Jigsaw expansion depth. Must be between 0 and 30.

start_height.description: HeightProvider controlling the initial Y position before the land search is applied.

land_search_direction.description: Whether to anchor the structure to the highest or lowest land surface found within the bounding box.

y_allowance.description: Restricts the Y range in which this structure is allowed to spawn.

min_y_allowed.description: Minimum world Y the structure may spawn at (inclusive).

max_y_allowed.description: Maximum world Y the structure may spawn at (inclusive). Must be >= min_y_allowed.

ledge_offset_y.description: Additional Y offset applied after the structure is anchored to the land surface. Range: 0–100.

cannot_spawn_in_liquid.description: If true, prevents the structure from spawning when the resolved surface is liquid. Defaults to false.

valid_biome_radius_check.description: Radius in chunks within which all biomes must pass the structure's biome filter. Range: 1–100.

pools_that_ignore_boundaries.description: Resource locations of template pools whose pieces are allowed to extend outside the structure's bounding box.

max_distance_from_center.description: Maximum block distance a jigsaw piece may be placed from the structure centre. Range: 1–128.

use_bounding_box_hack.description: Enables a bounding box workaround for structures that fail to assemble correctly. Defaults to false.

liquid_settings.description: Controls waterlogging behaviour during structure placement.
